name: Chocolate Mint Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the required temperature.
2. Grease and flour the cake pans.
3. In a bowl, mix together the mint-chocolate chips, water (divided), flour, salt, baking soda, baking powder, and brown sugar until combined.
4. Add butter and eggs, stirring until smooth.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake for the specified time or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cakes to cool in the pans for about 10 minutes before removing them.
